description: WER test set for QWR Voice Bot — Indian-accented English & Hinglish utterances
instructions: After a test call, fill in the 'hypothesis' field with what Gemini transcribed (from DB or logs). Run: python manage.py measure_wer

utterances.reference: Hello, I want to know about QWR's VR headsets
My name is Prashant Singh and I am calling from Lucknow
What is the price of VRone Pro headset?
Can you tell me about your education solutions for schools?
Mera company ka naam TechStar hai, Pune mein hai
utterances.notes: Intake — company and city in Hinglish

utterances.reference: I work as a software developer at Infosys in Bangalore
utterances.notes: Intake — role, company, city with Indian accent

utterances.reference: Please connect me with your sales team for a bulk order
Kya QWR defence ke liye bhi products banata hai?

I am interested in ODM and OEM services for our company
